config.script:
try:
		self.meta.visible = False
		utils.messages.waiting.showLoading()
		self.props.style.classes = 'wait'

		#Load property data
		name = str(self.view.custom.deviceName).strip()
		appKey = str(self.view.custom.appKey)
		devEUI = str(self.view.custom.devEUI)
		appEUI = str(self.view.custom.joinEUI)
		provider =  str(self.view.custom.tagProvider)
		modelID = self.view.custom.sensorType
		tagPath = str(self.session.custom.SiteName)
		description = str(self.view.custom.deviceDescription)
		tenantID = self.session.custom.tenantID
		latitude = self.view.custom.latitude
		longitude = self.view.custom.longitude		
		image = self.view.custom.image
		if tenantID > 1:
		
			#Add device
			
			result = device.createDevice.saveDevice(devEUI, appEUI, appKey, name, "", modelID, latitude, longitude, description, provider, tagPath, image, self.session.props.auth.user.userName, enterprise.tenant.getDefaultApp(), tenantID)
			
			system.perspective.print('Completed save device')
			system.perspective.print(result)
			utils.messages.waiting.hideLoading()
			if utils.resultParser.isResultSuccess(result):
				successMessage = utils.resultParser.getResultMessage(result)
				if "ERROR" in successMessage:
					utils.messages.success.showSuccessWait(successMessage)
				else:
					utils.messages.success.showSuccess(successMessage)
				self.view.custom.sensorType = -1
				self.view.custom.deviceDescription = ''
				self.view.custom.tagPath = ''
				self.view.custom.joinEUI= ''
				self.view.custom.devEUI= ''
				self.view.custom.appKey= ''
				self.view.custom.deviceName= ''
			else:
				utils.messages.errors.showErrorMessage(utils.resultParser.getResultMessage(result))

	
		self.props.style.classes=''
		
	except Exception as e:
		system.perspective.print(e)
		syncErrorMessage = str(e)
		utils.messages.errors.showErrorMessage(syncErrorMessage)
	finally:
		self.meta.visible = True
		utils.messages.waiting.hideLoading()

props.text: Open QR Sync on a mobile device through the Perspective app to utilize SiteSync's QR scan technology and automatically populate the fields below.

config.script:
import base64

	self.view.custom.image = ""
	b = base64.b64encode(event.file.getBytes())	
	self.view.custom.image = b
